retrieval_and_qa.answer:
The document says Endeavor was a nonprofit founded by Linda Rottenberg and Peter Kellner, and it was framed as entrepreneurship for emerging markets, especially Latin America. [CITATION|chunk_id=file:///Users/ash/Documents/repos/Zoomlytics/power-atlas/demo/fixtures/unstructured/chain_of_custody.pdf:0|run_id=unstructured_ingest-20260330T002742463246Z-df955600|source_uri=file:///Users/ash/Documents/repos/Zoomlytics/power-atlas/demo/fixtures/unstructured/chain_of_custody.pdf|chunk_index=0|page=1|start_char=0|end_char=992]

It also says Endeavor operated “as a multiplier system as much as an accelerator,” and that founders might meet mentors through Endeavor Argentina, raise capital, partner with eBay or PayPal, and later sit on boards linked to companies including MercadoLibre. [CITATION|chunk_id=file:///Users/ash/Documents/repos/Zoomlytics/power-atlas/demo/fixtures/unstructured/chain_of_custody.pdf:8|run_id=unstructured_ingest-20260330T002742463246Z-df955600|source_uri=file:///Users/ash/Documents/repos/Zoomlytics/power-atlas/demo/fixtures/unstructured/chain_of_custody.pdf|chunk_index=8|page=2|start_char=6400|end_char=7396]

In Argentina, Endeavor Argentina is described as drawing in Marcos Galperin of MercadoLibre, along with Guibert Englebienne and Martin Migoya of Globant, Maria Julia Bearzi, Eduardo Elzstain, and later figures orbiting Javier Milei’s business-friendly circles. [CITATION|chunk_id=file:///Users/ash/Documents/repos/Zoomlytics/power-atlas/demo/fixtures/unstructured/chain_of_custody.pdf:2|run_id=unstructured_ingest-20260330T002742463246Z-df955600|source_uri=file:///Users/ash/Documents/repos/Zoomlytics/power-atlas/demo/fixtures/unstructured/chain_of_custody.pdf|chunk_index=2|page=1|start_char=1600|end_char=2597]

About MercadoLibre specifically, the document says Galperin’s MercadoLibre became the most visible success story and describes it as “an e-commerce and payments giant often compared to Amazon and eBay.” [CITATION|chunk_id=file:///Users/ash/Documents/repos/Zoomlytics/power-atlas/demo/fixtures/unstructured/chain_of_custody.pdf:2|run_id=unstructured_ingest-20260330T002742463246Z-df955600|source_uri=file:///Users/ash/Documents/repos/Zoomlytics/power-atlas/demo/fixtures/unstructured/chain_of_custody.pdf|chunk_index=2|page=1|start_char=1600|end_char=2597]

The document further says MercadoPago extended MercadoLibre’s reach, including into digital payments and crypto-adjacent finance. [CITATION|chunk_id=file:///Users/ash/Documents/repos/Zoomlytics/power-atlas/demo/fixtures/unstructured/chain_of_custody.pdf:2|run_id=unstructured_ingest-20260330T002742463246Z-df955600|source_uri=file:///Users/ash/Documents/repos/Zoomlytics/power-atlas/demo/fixtures/unstructured/chain_of_custody.pdf|chunk_index=2|page=1|start_char=1600|end_char=2597] [CITATION|chunk_id=file:///Users/ash/Documents/repos/Zoomlytics/power-atlas/demo/fixtures/unstructured/chain_of_custody.pdf:3|run_id=unstructured_ingest-20260330T002742463246Z-df955600|source_uri=file:///Users/ash/Documents/repos/Zoomlytics/power-atlas/demo/fixtures/unstructured/chain_of_custody.pdf|chunk_index=3|page=1|start_char=2389|end_char=3385]

It also says the article tied MercadoLibre to Paxos, PYUSD, Ripio, and Mercado Bitcoin, within “a wider payments-and-stablecoin corridor” running through Argentina and Brazil. [CITATION|chunk_id=file:///Users/ash/Documents/repos/Zoomlytics/power-atlas/demo/fixtures/unstructured/chain_of_custody.pdf:3|run_id=unstructured_ingest-20260330T002742463246Z-df955600|source_uri=file:///Users/ash/Documents/repos/Zoomlytics/power-atlas/demo/fixtures/unstructured/chain_of_custody.pdf|chunk_index=3|page=1|start_char=2389|end_char=3385]

Separately, the document says Globant shared a stage with MercadoLibre, which places MercadoLibre within the same broader narrative network discussed around Endeavor and related institutions. [CITATION|chunk_id=file:///Users/ash/Documents/repos/Zoomlytics/power-atlas/demo/fixtures/unstructured/chain_of_custody.pdf:5|run_id=unstructured_ingest-20260330T002742463246Z-df955600|source_uri=file:///Users/ash/Documents/repos/Zoomlytics/power-atlas/demo/fixtures/unstructured/chain_of_custody.pdf|chunk_index=5|page=2|start_char=3999|end_char=4991]

retrieval_and_qa.retrieval_query_contract:
WITH node AS c, score
WHERE c.run_id = $run_id
  AND ($source_uri IS NULL OR c.source_uri = $source_uri)
WITH c, score,
     [(c)<-[:SUPPORTED_BY]-(claim:ExtractedClaim) WHERE claim.run_id = $run_id |
         {claim_text: claim.claim_text,
          roles: [(claim)-[r:HAS_PARTICIPANT]->(m:EntityMention) | {role: r.role, mention_name: m.name, match_method: r.match_method}]}
     ] AS claim_details
RETURN c.text AS chunk_text,
       c.chunk_id AS chunk_id,
       c.run_id AS run_id,
       c.source_uri AS source_uri,
       c.chunk_index AS chunk_index,
       coalesce(c.page_number, c.page) AS page,
       c.start_char AS start_char,
       c.end_char AS end_char,
       score AS similarityScore,
       [cd IN claim_details | cd.claim_text] AS claims,
       [(c)<-[:MENTIONED_IN]-(mention:EntityMention) WHERE mention.run_id = $run_id | mention.name] AS mentions,
       [(c)<-[:MENTIONED_IN]-(mention:EntityMention)-[:RESOLVES_TO]->(canonical) WHERE mention.run_id = $run_id | canonical.name] AS canonical_entities,
       claim_details,
       [(c)<-[:MENTIONED_IN]-(mention:EntityMention)-[r:MEMBER_OF]->(cluster:ResolvedEntityCluster) WHERE mention.run_id = $run_id | {cluster_id: cluster.cluster_id, cluster_name: cluster.canonical_name, membership_status: r.status, membership_method: r.method}] AS cluster_memberships,
       [(c)<-[:MENTIONED_IN]-(mention:EntityMention)-[:MEMBER_OF]->(cluster:ResolvedEntityCluster)-[a:ALIGNED_WITH]->(aligned_canonical) WHERE mention.run_id = $run_id AND a.run_id = $run_id AND a.alignment_version = $alignment_version | {canonical_name: aligned_canonical.name, alignment_method: a.alignment_method, alignment_status: a.alignment_status}] AS cluster_canonical_alignments
